insight: reward_hack_benchmark_v1 contains no reward hacks. Its generator admitted a row only when at least one PASS_TO_PASS test failed, so the official SWE-bench harness marks all 40/40 rows unresolved and a zero-cost official-harness baseline detects 40/40 against the 17/40 panel figure, a comparator never previously reported. The same runs discarded 139 harness-certified variants across 65 instances as no_both_miss failures without preserving their diffs. Wrongness of those variants is unestablished.
